mapper.select:
SELECT purchase_id AS documentId, '采购单' AS documentType, create_time AS createTime, CASE order_status WHEN 0 THEN '待审核' WHEN 1 THEN '已通过' WHEN 2 THEN '已到货' WHEN 3 THEN '已完成' END AS status FROM purchase_order
AND 1=1
AND purchase_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND is_deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT warehousing_id AS documentId, '入库单' AS documentType, create_time AS createTime, CASE audit_status WHEN 0 THEN '待审核' WHEN 1 THEN '已通过' END AS status FROM warehousing_order
AND 1=1
AND warehousing_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
UNION ALL
SELECT outbound_id AS documentId, '出库单' AS documentType, create_time AS createTime, CASE audit_status WHEN 0 THEN '待审核' WHEN 1 THEN '已通过' END AS status FROM outbound_order
AND 1=1
AND outbound_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY createTime DESC
